content: The Self-Refine iterative self-feedback framework can be structurally augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a new two-layer self-improvement pipeline for LLMs: outer-loop iterative refinement of raw outputs, and inner-loop reflection that leverages conflicting problem-solving perspectives to generate more reliable self-feedback. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled supervision, while addressing the common weakness of single-perspective self-feedback that overlooks blind spots in the LLM's initial output.
